last_updated_focus: Report request workflow and artifact indexing wording cleanup: user-requested reports use report_writer feedback before execution, and report_writer artifact indexing distinguishes created artifacts from newly indexed routed report artifacts.
notes: Public package identity is causal-consultant. The main skill is the only user-facing voice. The live YAML uses lean actions with agent_called, mode, action_goal, status, and refs. Every routed subskill writes its standard owner/result section plus one shared-format council entry; execution-capable subskills index artifacts they create or inspect under scope.
